title: Collect CloudWatch log events into canonical event records

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
As an operator, I want Caducus to collect CloudWatch log events into canonical event records, so that the system can analyze live operational log streams.

Feature: CloudWatch event collection
  Scenario: Collect configured CloudWatch log events
    Given a Caducus configuration that enables a CloudWatch collector
    And the collector is configured with one or more log groups
    When I run the Caducus collect command
    Then Caducus reads new CloudWatch log events from those log groups
    And Caducus writes one canonical event record per collected event
    And each event record includes a timestamp, text summary, group_id, source, and metadata

  Scenario: Override the default group_id for a CloudWatch collector
    Given a Caducus configuration that enables a CloudWatch collector
    And the collector has an explicit group_id override
    When I collect CloudWatch log events
    Then Caducus writes the configured group_id into the event records
